class.name: rover_hmi_core/PlottingModule
class.description: Real-time position and velocity plots for all arm joints

class.name: rover_hmi_core/MotorConfigModule
class.description: Per-motor PID gains and limits from firmware config

class.name: rover_hmi_core/CommandLogModule
class.description: Log of sent commands and driver messages

class.name: rover_hmi_core/ScienceModule
class.description: Science subsystem control: sequences, valves, pump, carousel, dispensing, OSF, and utilities

class.name: rover_hmi_core/SciencePipelineModule
class.description: Science pipeline timeline: 4-step workflow tracker from drilling to analysis

class.name: rover_hmi_core/ScienceAnalysisModule
class.description: Science instrument readouts: spectrophotometer chart, NPK probe, fluorometer, gas sensor

class.name: rover_hmi_core/DriveModule
class.description: Virtual joystick driving interface — publishes geometry_msgs/Twist to /cmd_vel
